name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.13.0 -> 1.14.0): #742 opt rabbit-spec into the contract strict CONTIGUOUS invariant-numbering tier (#724 follow-up). Added Inv 8 documenting the contiguous_invariants opt-in; set feature.json contiguous_invariants: true. Numbering was already contiguous 1..7 so no reflow was needed. New E2E guard test-contiguous-invariants-optin.py asserts the flag + contiguity via the live contract check.
